languages.text: "Вношу в протокол: приговоренн{mf|ый|ая} не испытывает раскаяния за свои деяния. Перейдем к рассмотру отдельных ересей, свершенных приговоренн{mf|ым|ой}".
"Let the record show that the defendant expresses no remorse for {mf|his|her} deeds. We will proceed to the examination of the individual heresies committed by the defendant."
languages.original_text: "Вношу в протокол: приговоренн{mf|ый|ая} не испытывает раскаяния за свои деяния. Перейдем к рассмотру отдельных ересей, свершенных приговоренн{mf|ым|ой}".

traits.locale_text: "Let the record show that the defendant expresses no remorse for {mf|his|her} deeds. We will proceed to the examination of the individual heresies committed by the defendant."

"Let the record show that the defendant expresses no remorse for {mf|his|her} deeds. We will proceed to the examination of the individual heresies committed by the defendant."

languages.text: "Die Aufzeichnungen werden beweisen, dass {mf|der|die} Angeklagte keinerlei Reue für {mf|seine|ihre} Taten zeigt. Wir fahren nun mit der Untersuchung der persönlichen Ketzereien {mf|des|der} Angeklagten fort."
languages.original_text: "Let the record show that the defendant expresses no remorse for {mf|his|her} deeds. We will proceed to the examination of the individual heresies committed by the defendant."

traits.locale_text: "Die Aufzeichnungen werden beweisen, dass {mf|der|die} Angeklagte keinerlei Reue für {mf|seine|ihre} Taten zeigt. Wir fahren nun mit der Untersuchung der persönlichen Ketzereien {mf|des|der} Angeklagten fort."

languages.text: « Qu'il soit inscrit au procès-verbal que l'{mf|accusé|accusée} ne manifeste aucun remords pour ses forfaits. Nous allons maintenant procéder à l'examen individuel de ses hérésies. »
languages.original_text: "Let the record show that the defendant expresses no remorse for {mf|his|her} deeds. We will proceed to the examination of the individual heresies committed by the defendant."

traits.locale_text: « Qu'il soit inscrit au procès-verbal que l'{mf|accusé|accusée} ne manifeste aucun remords pour ses forfaits. Nous allons maintenant procéder à l'examen individuel de ses hérésies. »

languages.text: “被告对自己犯下的罪行毫无悔意，相关内容已记录在案。接下来，我们将逐一审查被告犯下的异端恶行。”
languages.original_text: "Let the record show that the defendant expresses no remorse for {mf|his|her} deeds. We will proceed to the examination of the individual heresies committed by the defendant."

traits.locale_text: “被告对自己犯下的罪行毫无悔意，相关内容已记录在案。接下来，我们将逐一审查被告犯下的异端恶行。”

languages.text: «Que quede registrado que {mf|el|la} acusad{mf|o|a} no demuestra ningún remordimiento por sus actos. Procederemos con el análisis de las herejías cometidas por {mf|el|la} acusad{mf|o|a}».
languages.original_text: "Let the record show that the defendant expresses no remorse for {mf|his|her} deeds. We will proceed to the examination of the individual heresies committed by the defendant."

traits.locale_text: «Que quede registrado que {mf|el|la} acusad{mf|o|a} no demuestra ningún remordimiento por sus actos. Procederemos con el análisis de las herejías cometidas por {mf|el|la} acusad{mf|o|a}».

languages.text: 「被告は自らの行為に対し一切の悔悟を示さなかったと記録に残します。これより、被告が犯した個別の異端行為についての審問を進めます」
languages.original_text: "Let the record show that the defendant expresses no remorse for {mf|his|her} deeds. We will proceed to the examination of the individual heresies committed by the defendant."

traits.locale_text: 「被告は自らの行為に対し一切の悔悟を示さなかったと記録に残します。これより、被告が犯した個別の異端行為についての審問を進めます」

languages.text: "Sanığın işlediği suçlardan pişmanlık duymadığı da kayıtlara geçsin. Şimdi kendisinin işlediği kâfirlikleri bir bir gözler önüne sereceğiz."
languages.original_text: "Let the record show that the defendant expresses no remorse for {mf|his|her} deeds. We will proceed to the examination of the individual heresies committed by the defendant."

traits.locale_text: "Sanığın işlediği suçlardan pişmanlık duymadığı da kayıtlara geçsin. Şimdi kendisinin işlediği kâfirlikleri bir bir gözler önüne sereceğiz."
